sourceEvidence.finding: QCSUnQlfDeal stores report/material/batch/reason/dealer fields, not a numeric bad quantity.
Controller exposes treatment save/submit and public createUnQlfDeal; no standalone bad quantity endpoint was found.
createUnQlfDealForOtherModule creates a treatment document from an effective unqualified inspection report and workflow config.
Unqualified pass-check returns needRejectReport=1; a code comment still marks bad product treatment as a follow-up path.

databaseEvidence.explicitBadColumnSql: select table_name,column_name,data_type from information_schema.columns where table_schema='public' and (table_name like 'qcs_%' or table_name like 'wom_%') and (lower(column_name) like '%bad%' or lower(column_name) like '%defect%' or lower(column_name) like '%scrap%' or lower(column_name) like '%unqualified%' or lower(column_name) like '%unqlf%' or lower(column_name) like '%un_qlf%') order by table_name, ordinal_position;

acceptedEvidence.meaning: QCS unqualified report effective state automatically generated qcs_un_qlf_deals and pending task.

degradedRelease treatment decision persisted and backfilled WOM/batch state.
return treatment decision persisted and backfilled WOM/batch state.
Direct unqualified syncInspectReport backfilled WOM task/exelog/wait and batch availability.

remainingBlockers.reason: No recovered frontend route, runtime button, source endpoint, or PostgreSQL table column maps to an independent bad quantity registration action.
material tenant service is absent from current deployment, so checkProdResult and generateProduceOutSing return 503.
